comments.comment: Consider updating this collection name based on the 'FF.200.CLP' and 'FF.200.STR' canvases from the Forever Flowers rebuild. We previously defined a premium tier structure and naming conventions that better align with a higher price point.
Reference the pricing logic and product segmentation discussed in 'FF.300.FIN' and 'FF.200.MES'. These canvases support shifting base price anchors to justify a ₪400+ positioning.

This should be restructured based on the visual hierarchy logic outlined in 'FF.500.COL' and the collection tier breakdown in 'FF.200.CLP'. We already set definitions for Studio, Bespoke, and Mini tiers.
Align this visual recommendation with the aesthetic and contextual guidelines in 'FF.200.VSN' and 'FF.600.HEB'. These define the Restoration Hardware/Habitat-inspired presentation.
Cross-check this plan with the structural UX recommendations in 'FF.200.HOM' for homepage and collection layout refinement.
